subject: Rhydon, a large gray bipedal rhinoceros-like Pokemon with a drill horn on its forehead, charging forward in a rocky environment
description: A large, heavily armored gray bipedal creature charges forward through what appears to be a rocky or stone-filled environment. It has a prominent spiral drill-like horn on its forehead, thick plated hide, and a stocky but powerful build. The creature's posture is forward-leaning and aggressive — arms slightly raised, weight committed to a charge. The background shows rocks and earthy debris consistent with a cave, mountain, or rocky terrain. The color palette is predominantly gray and brown, earthy and rough.
foreground: Rhydon charging forward, large gray armored body, drill horn prominent
background: rocky terrain, earthy browns and grays
